schedule.dialogue: Early to rise, early to tend the crops.
The soil is rich this season.
The fields rest, and so should I.

default: Mornin'! I'm Bramble, the town farmer.
The garden patch is doing well this season.
If you need tips on growing crops, just ask!
Your monster ranch is impressive. I can teach you a trick or two.
The land provides for those who tend it with care.
garden: Water your crops before heading into the dungeon!
Different seasons favor different crops. Plan ahead.
